Design Lab

Product

Print location

Each location holds its own design — a dot marks the ones you've designed. "Anywhere" opens the whole front/back for placement — that's 1-color vinyl territory.

Color

Backdrop

Add to design

Drag items to move them. Use the corner squares to resize and the round handle to rotate.

Clip art

Drag to spin · grab a design to move it

Properties

Select an item on the canvas to edit it, or add text / an image / clip art to get started.

Instant quote

Shirt pricing. White vs. colored garment is detected from the color swatch. Some rates are still placeholder estimates — tell me your shop's real rates and I'll plug them in.
